repo.description: Heterogenous, Task- and Domain-Specific Benchmark for Unsupervised Sentence Embeddings used in the TSDAE paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.06979.

terms.context_snippet: This repository hosts the data and the evaluation script for reproducing the results reported in the paper: "[TSDAE: Using Transformer-based Sequential Denoising Auto-Encoder for Unsupervised Sentence Embedding Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.06979)" (EMNLP 2021 Findings). …
